instruction: Company A donated ${129 {\textstyle\frac{1}{4}}}$ lb of food to a food bank, and Company B donated ${128 {\textstyle\frac{3}{4}}}$ lb. The food bank will hand out these two companies’ donation to families in need. Each family will receive ${4 {\textstyle\frac{7}{9}}}$ lb of food. How many families will be fed by the donation? Solution: The donation can be used to feed [ANS] families.
